scripts.build: bun run build:node && bun run build:python
scripts.validate: bun run contracts:check && bun run release:check && bun run validate:node && bun run validate:python
scripts.validate:python: uv run --locked --project packages/python ruff format --check packages/python && uv run --locked --project packages/python ruff check packages/python && uv run --locked --project packages/python ty check packages/python
scripts.test: bun run test:node && bun run test:python
scripts.pack:python: uv build --project packages/python && uv run --locked --project packages/python python packages/python/scripts/validate_dist.py
